Khare : rakeshkhare@hotmail.com : 9425053428 : View Profile Latest News & Events Site Visit Report: Dynamic Pile Load Testing Using PDA at Omaxe City, Indore 12-01-2026 Expert Lecture on Modern Construction Practices and Sustainable Building Materials 13-11-2025 Civil Engineering Celebrates as SGSITS Women Triumph in Inter-College Kabaddi Championship 30-10-2025 SGSITS Civil Engineering Department Hosts Technical Quiz Competition on Engineers' Day 20-10-2025 View More Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics UG in Civil Engineering Started with 30 seats in 1956, Intake increased to 120 in 2012, Accredited in 2003. PG in Structural Engineering Started with 10 seats in 1965, Intake increased to 25 in 2002, Accredited in 2003 and 2013 (for 5 years) PG in Transportation Engineering Started with 10 seats in 1969, Intake increased to 25 in 2002 PG in Water Resource Engineering Started with 10 seats in 1993, Intake increased to 25 in 2002 PG in Environment Engineering Started with 10 seats in 1994, Intake increased to 25 in 2002. Vision and Mission Vision A department that plays leading role in Civil Engineering for building a prosperous Madhya Pradesh and self-reliant strong Bharat by developing competent human- power to meet the sustainable dynamic techno-socio-economic needs of the world. विभाग की दृष्टि एक विभाग जो सिविल इंजीनियरिंग क्षेत्र में, विश्‍व की संधारणीय गतिशील तकनीकी-सामाजिक-आर्थिक आवश्‍यकताओं की पूर्ति हेतु सक्षम जनशक्ति का सृजन करते हुए समृद्ध मध्‍यप्रदेश तथा आत्‍मनिर्भर, सशक्‍त भारत के निर्माण में अग्रणी भूमिका निभाए| Mission M1 - To generate highly competent experts in Civil Engineering inspired by the spirit of “Nation First” and eternal human values. M2 - To develop students capable of accelerating sustainable techno-socio-economic development in the professional world. M3 - To motivate students to apply the knowledge of civil engineering through research innovation & Engineering Practices. विभाग का ध्येय एम1 – राष्ट्र सर्वोपरी की भावना और शाश्वत मानवीय मूल्यों से प्रेरित उच्‍च दक्षता सम्‍पन्‍न सिविल इंजीनियरिंग विशेषज्ञों का निर्माण करना। एम2 – व्यावसायिक जगत में संधारणीय तकनीकी‑सामाजिक‑आर्थिक विकास को तीव्र गति प्रदान करने में सक्षम विद्यार्थियों का विकास करना। एम3 – विद्यार्थियों को अनुसंधान, नवाचार और अभियान्त्रिकी अभ्यासों के माध्यम से सिविल इंजीनियरिंग के ज्ञान का अनुप्रयोग करने हेतु प्रेरित करना। Explore SGSITS Campus Map Photo Gallery SGSITS Anthem Quick Findings TEQIP RTI Anti Ragging Committee & Squad SGSITS Grievance Redressal & Feedback AICTE Feedback for Students & Faculty ICC(Internal Complaint Committee) Institute Discipline Committtee Student Counsellor IPR Cell Important Links Digital Initiative by MHRD Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Directorate of Technical Education All India Council for Technical Education University Grants Commission MPOnline CRISP INDIA Get In Touch Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology & Science Add: 23 Sir M.
